source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Bigger Blast
upgrades.description: Bigger shells deliver a bigger blast radius.

upgrades.name: Bloon Buster
upgrades.description: Smash through 3 layers of Bloons at once!

upgrades.name: Shell Shock
upgrades.description: Blast shockwave stuns Bloons at impact, pops bloons in a wider area, and increases Burny Stuff damage.

upgrades.name: The Big One
upgrades.description: Devastating explosions pop 10 layers. Increases Burny Stuff damage further.

upgrades.name: The Biggest One
upgrades.description: Blasts deeply through Bloons and layers over a huge area, plus powerful Burny Stuff damage.

upgrades.name: Faster Reload
upgrades.description: Increases the attack speed of the Mortar.

upgrades.name: Heavy Shells
upgrades.description: Heavy shells do extra damage to Ceramic, Lead, Fortified, MOABs, and stunned Bloons. Attacks faster and can also pop Black Bloons.

upgrades.name: Artillery Battery
upgrades.description: Bombardment Ability: Unleashes a rapid fire attack in a slightly wider area. Upgrades to 3 barrels for incredibly fast attacks.

upgrades.name: Pop and Awe
upgrades.description: Pop and Awe has permanent rapid attack speed. Pop and Awe Ability: rains explosions over the whole screen, damaging Bloons and stunning them periodically.

upgrades.name: Burny Stuff
upgrades.description: Damaged Bloons are set ablaze momentarily with each hit.

upgrades.name: Signal Flare
upgrades.description: Camo Bloons popped by flares lose their camouflage permanently.

upgrades.name: Shattering Shells
upgrades.description: Shattering shells strip special Bloon properties off all but the biggest bloons. Burny stuff melts through 5 layers with each shot and burns MOAB-class Bloons for extra damage.

upgrades.name: Blooncineration
upgrades.description: Superhot burny stuff that incinerates MOAB-Class Bloons with ease.
